description: Module remove scheduled — customer removed Offers from the dashboard, full access until effective date

expected.subject: Got it — Offers scheduled for 2026-06-01
expected.body:
Hi Priya,

Quick confirmation — your module change is queued.

You are REMOVING: Offers

Effective from: 2026-06-01

What happens between now and then:
  • Nothing changes on your bill THIS month — you keep
    full access to Offers until 2026-06-01
    since you have already paid.
  • From 2026-06-01: your monthly bill drops by
    £4/mo and Offers is gone.
  • No refund for the rest of this month — that is
    consistent across every billing change.

Changed your mind? Just open your dashboard and remove the
pending change. Anything done by you before the effective
date is reversible from there.

— ModuForge
